)]Yes — I got the latest dosing info.

Quick summary for Dr. Martinez:
- CU-001: 0.15 mg/kg at 12.4 kg → 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14
- CU-002: 0.12 mg/kg at 9.1 kg → 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12
- CU-003: 0.18 mg/kg at 15.7 kg → 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10

Clinical notes in the config look generally favorable:
- CU-001: stable, 22% tumor regression at last scan
- CU-002: responding well, weight gain improving
- CU-003: newly enrolled, first dose given 2026-03-27

I also saved a short report titled:
- Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary

On PK model stability:
- Fact: the dosing config is present and internally consistent.
- Inference: the patient notes suggest the current dosing regimen is behaving as expected clinically.
- Limitation: I did not validate the PK models themselves in this step, so I can’t honestly confirm model stability from this check alone.

If you want, I can next review the PK-related files/logs and give you a direct stability assessment.
